trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo's 2025 capsule test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top picks for quality, taste, and machine compatibility.
